description: This email template is a perfect blend of professionalism and simplicity, designed especially for business services in the finance and e-commerce sectors. It features a clean, three-column layout, making it easy to detail services, payments, and receipts. The light, airy design is accented with a refreshing light green, symbolizing growth and financial success. The template also includes a dedicated section to express your gratitude to your clients, adding a personal touch to your transactions. It's not just an invoice; it's a comprehensive record of your business transactions, ensuring transparency and trust. This template is a great tactic to manage your finances, keeping track of the money flow in a stylish, efficient manner.
short_description: Ideal for business services and e-commerce, this transactional email template streamlines invoicing with a clean, three-column layout in light green and white. Simplify payments, provide clear receipts, and foster positive financial interactions. Features a 'Thank You' section for a personal touch.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
